invariant.transactions_without_items.description: Transactions that have zero corresponding transaction_items rows.

invariant.items_sum_mismatch.description: Transactions where every item has a non-null amount and SUM(item.amount) ≠ transaction.amount.

invariant.fee_refund_without_parent.description: fee/refund transactions whose parent_transaction_id is NULL.

invariant.orphan_parent_reference.description: Transactions whose parent_transaction_id does not resolve to any existing transactions.id.

invariant.category_tag_on_transaction.description: Transactions whose tags array contains <major>:<subcategory> elements that should live only on items.

invariant.orphan_category_tag_on_item.description: transaction_items whose <major>:<subcategory> tags are not present in the categories table.

sampler.transactions_by_shape.description: Transactions grouped by shape: (has_note × items_count_bucket × has_plain_tags).

sampler.transactions_by_source.description: Transactions grouped by source with per-source counts for invariant violations (FR-009 through FR-013).

sampler.longest_notes.description: Top 20 transactions ordered by LENGTH(note) descending.

sampler.longest_tags_arrays.description: Top 20 transactions ordered by tags array length descending.

sampler.longest_item_names.description: Top 20 transaction_items ordered by LENGTH(name) descending.
